performance_overview: Through 20 sessions (inception 2026-06-01 through 2026-06-24) Bull has completed 7 trades: 3W/4L (43% win rate, avg +0.15%/trade). Cumulative: Bull -0.0612% vs SPY -3.5239%, alpha +3.46 pts. Today (2026-06-24) was the 14th consecutive no-entry session; PANW reversed hard from premarket highs (RSI 43 at open), MGM printed a gap-up trap (RSI 76.5), LLY remained weak all day. Cash preservation continues to outperform significantly as SPY drifts lower — down -3.52% since inception while Bull is nearly flat.
best_signals: RSI 55-60 at entry: 2/2 wins (100%), avg +2.15% — the only consistently profitable bucket; enforce hard ceiling at RSI 60; n=2 (directionally clean, sample small)
avoid: RSI 60-65 at entry: 0/3 wins (0%), avg -1.06% — all overbought chase entries have lost; hard ceiling, no exceptions
RSI 65-75 at entry: 0/1 wins (0%), avg -0.61% — confirmed gap-up trap pattern; skip entirely; MGM's RSI 76.5 gap-up today is the 5th instance of this failure mode
overnight_hold_insights: Zero overnight carries across all 20 sessions. The six-criteria gate (profitable + trailing-stop-active + above EMA-21 + no earnings within 2 days + sentiment not negative + 5% gap-risk cushion) has never been met simultaneously. Extended/thin candidate pool prevents qualified entries, let alone overnight candidates. Policy is sound — no change warranted.

notes_for_next_session:
FOR MIDDAY / EOD AGENT (2026-06-25).

BOOK STATE: Flat. No positions entered at market open. Equity ~$99,938.80.

REASON FOR NO ENTRY: All 4 candidates (ES, MGM, AMD, PANW) opened with RSI extended above the hard 60 ceiling:

  - MGM: RSI 67.31 at open — gap-up trap per memory (0/4 wins above RSI 60); also ATR% 0.109, rel_vol 0.80, close below VWAP and prior_day_high
  - AMD: RSI 82.84, MACD hist falling — extreme extension, no entry under any circumstance today
  - PANW: RSI 71.08 above ceiling, rel_vol 1.06 below 1.3, close below VWAP

REGIME: DOWN — EMA-9 740.66 < EMA-21 741.79. Position cap remains 5 if any entries later.

WHAT TO WATCH:
  - MGM is the only name with genuine structural quality (VCP 0.598, exceptional vol dry-up 0.469). If RSI flushes back to 55-60 intraday with a VWAP reclaim and rel_vol >= 1.3 — that is a legitimate setup. However, midday entries outside the 9:31-10:30 AM window are beyond the open play agent scope.
  - PANW RS still strong (1.175) and broke above prior day high (291.71 > 290.50) — watch for consolidation; if it holds and RSI cools, could be a candidate for the next morning scan.
  - AMD gap up nearly $25 (+4.7%) on extreme RSI 82.84 — high risk of reversal, do not chase.

SESSION PATTERN: 15th+ consecutive no-entry session at open. The market continues to offer gap-up traps (RSI extended at open) or below-threshold setups. Cash preservation vs SPY down -3.52% since inception confirms the gate is working correctly.
